hooks.prompt: If this plan has 4 or more implementation steps, validate it with ora:Momus before exiting — Momus catches blocking issues like missing files, impossible tasks, and contradictions that waste implementation time. Spawn Agent(subagent_type='ora:Momus') with the full plan text and wait for its verdict. If Momus returns [REJECT], fix the cited issues and re-validate. If [OKAY] or the plan has fewer than 4 steps, proceed with ExitPlanMode.
